title: [ForceFunctionAttrs] Fix handling of `alwaysinline` and `noinline` attributes.
author: justinfargnoli

comments.author: justinfargnoli
comments.body: Once this PR is merged, I'll revert 58de8f2c25291549dc1cabe364d399e564bca042 and include a note in the reverted commit message to use this functionality instead.

comments.author: justinfargnoli
comments.body:
Merging despite CI failures

- My initial CI run passed
- #180569, an unrelated PR, is also failing the same tests https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/180569#issuecomment-3873314966

Edit: 

- Code formatter failing due to GitHub rate limiting
  - ```github.GithubException.GithubException: 429 {"message": "This endpoint is temporarily being throttled. Please try again later. For more on scraping GitHub and how it may affect your rights, please review our Terms of Service (https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/github-terms/github-terms-of-service)", "documentation_url": "https://docs.github.com/rest/using-the-rest-api/rate-limits-for-the-rest-api", "status": "429"}```

comments.author: boomanaiden154
comments.body: Yeah, the CI failures are unrelated. They were fixed in 74c8891c9afe4bd836ab385f4489b1ede5c28a0e.
